Defendant CARL L. HASZ, Tel No. (415) 621-2530 appearing in pro per.

RULING - Defendant did not provide the Court or opposing side with notice of his intent to appear today to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CARL HASZ'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is denied. Plaintiff demonstrates that defendant was substitute served. See CCP 415.20(b); Proof of Service from Kris Vorsatz and Don Phillips. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
